title: A Rebuild of time itself
wikitext:
[]: A Rebuild of time itself ? Post by KotL » Tue Apr 26, 2011 11:52 am Hi everyone, I'm new here, but I've got a few questions that didn't find their answers, even tough I've read a few topics on these boards and other, especially the "Interesting little details in 2.XX" thread up to page 8 (long and interesting is this thread !). Here's my thoughts: Couldn't Rebuild of Evangelion be like a leap backward in time ? Let me explain the few clues I have: -Wasn't the blood smear on the moon caused by the giant Rei at the end of EoE, when she's somewhat decapitated ? - Kaoru , at the end of E2.00, says to Shinji "He'll make him happy this time" or somethig like that, does he mean something like "I've failed the first time, now we're back in time/the third impact gives us another chance (I'll explain on that later)" ? - Kaoru (who's supposed to be an Angel IIRC) is already there, maybe having lost his "Angel status", being reborn as a human and acknowledging Gendô as his "father" in the scene on the moon (maximum mindfu**). -To me, the Second Impact in Rebuild looks a lot like the Third Impact in EoE . - Rei becoming more and more "human", just like Rei-03 in the last episodes of NG:E. -A contrario Asuka understanding she's not anymore the "Prom Queen" she was in NG:E, closing in on herself a little more after every "trial". I think that maybe the 3rd Impact we have seen in Eoe HAS happened , and that Shinji, using the godlike powers of the Eva-01, REBUILT the world in a way, giving himself a chance to accomplish the goal that was set for him by his father or something like that. What I mean is that Shinji became one with everyone in the end, but was the only one being offered the chance to create a new world, being a god, after all the talk with everyone etc... (Is it named the Complementarity Plan ? I don't know the English name, sorry). That's why Shinji seems a little more confident (to me at least), somewhere in his brain is the remembrance that he tried and failed, he now knows what's important and the ways to protect it. I know this might be confused, it's just ideas and little clues I've gathered after watching the movies a second time, and I really want to see the next episodes to clarify all that ! Until then, I'm relying on you to help me by discussing this ? Thanks for your attention ! PS: Sorry if my English is bad, I'm French and trying my best.

[]: Post by Kendrix » Tue Apr 26, 2011 12:01 pm We call that "sequel theory" and there already are threads to it. ...It's bogus, tough. The characters may develop into other directions, but they start out basically the same (See 1.0 or the first third of 2.0 where Asuka is just as full of herself as ever) What you're feeling there is that the creator whose mind the characters sprung from is "older and wiser" now... ...Also, how on earth was the third Rei more human?

[]: Post by KotL » Tue Apr 26, 2011 12:14 pm Kendrix wrote: We call that "sequel theory" and there already are threads to it. ...It's bogus, tough.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Apr 26, 2011 12:33 pm Locked on request. Feel free to bump this most recent thread (but read through it before bumping!), if you like: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=6022
